explorer.fileNesting.patterns..config: ${capture}.*, package.json, package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, .npmrc, .yarnrc, .nvmrc, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.*.json, .tsconfig.*, vite.config.*, *.config.js, *.config.ts, *.config.cjs, *.config.mjs, .postcssrc, postcss.config.*, .eslintrc.*, .prettierrc.*, .env, .env.*, .editorconfig, .gitignore, main.tsx, index.css, vite-env.d.ts, config.ts, index.html, index.ts, app.ts
